    }

    .mode-card p {
      font-size: 0.82rem;
      color: #777;
      line-height: 1.5;
    }

    .mode-tag {
      display: inline-block;
      padding: 2px 10px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }

    .tag-red { background: #fce4e4; color: var(--accent); }
    .tag-green { background: #e4f9e8; color: var(--jade); }
    .tag-gold { background: #fff8e1; color: #b8860b; }
    .tag-dark { background: #eee; color: var(--ink); }

    /* ─── Radical Filter ─── */
    .radical-section {
      margin-top: 32px;
      padding: 20px;
      background: white;
      border-radius: 16px;
    }

    .radical-section h4 {
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      margin-bottom: 12px;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
    }

    .radical-chips {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 8px;
    }

    .radical-chip {
      padding: 6px 14px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      border: 1.5px solid var(--mist);
      background: var(--cloud);
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.2s;
      font-family: 'LXGW WenKai TC', sans-serif;
    }

    .radical-chip.on {
      background: var(--ink);
      color: white;
      border-color: var(--ink);
    }

    .radical-chip:hover { border-color: var(--accent); }

    .chip-actions {
      display: flex;
      gap: 8px;
    }

    .chip-actions button {
      background: none;
      border: none;
      color: var(--accent);
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      cursor: pointer;
      font-weight: 700;
      font-family: 'LXGW WenKai TC', sans-serif;
    }

    /* ─── Browse ─── */
    .browse-tabs {
      display: flex;
      overflow-x: auto;
      gap: 8px;
      padding: 8px 0;
      -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
      scrollbar-width: none;
    }

    .browse-tabs::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }

    .browse-tab {
      flex-shrink: 0;
      padding: 8px 16px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      border: 1.5px solid var(--mist);
      background: white;
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.2s;
      font-family: 'LXGW WenKai TC', sans-serif;
    }

    .browse-tab.active {
      background: var(--ink);
      color: white;
      border-color: var(--ink);
    }

    .card-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(140px, 1fr));
      gap: 12px;
      margin-top: 16px;
    }

    .char-card {
      background: white;
      border-radius: 12px;
      padding: 20px 12px;
      text-align: center;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.3s;
      border: 1.5px solid var(--cloud);
      position: relative;
    }

    .char-card:hover {
      transform: translateY(-3px);
      box-shadow: 0 8px 24px var(--shadow);
    }

    .char-card .big-char {
      font-family: 'ZCOOL KuaiLe', cursive;
      font-size: 2.8rem;
      color: var(--ink);
      line-height: 1.2;
    }

    .char-card .card-zhuyin {
      font-size: 1rem;
      color: var(--accent);
      margin-top: 4px;
      font-weight: 700;
    }

    .char-card .card-pinyin {
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      color: #999;
      margin-top: 2px;
    }

    .char-card .card-words {
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      color: #777;
      margin-top: 8px;
      line-height: 1.6;
    }

    .char-card.flipped {
      background: var(--ink);
    }

    .char-card.flipped .big-char { color: var(--gold); }
    .char-card.flipped .card-zhuyin { color: #ff7675; }
    .char-card.flipped .card-pinyin { color: #dfe6e9; }
    .char-card.flipped .card-words { color: #b2bec3; }

    /* ─── Quiz ─── */
    .quiz-header {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      margin-bottom: 24px;
      position: relative;
    }

    .quiz-progress {
      font-size: 0.82rem;
      color: #888;
    }

    .quiz-score {
      display: flex;
      gap: 16px;
      font-size: 0.85rem;
    }

    .score-item {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 4px;
      font-weight: 700;
    }

    .progress-bar {
      width: 100%;
      height: 4px;
      background: var(--cloud);
      border-radius: 2px;
      margin-bottom: 24px;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .progress-fill {
      height: 100%;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent), var(--gold));
      border-radius: 2px;
      transition: width 0.4s ease;
    }

    .quiz-card {
      background: white;
      border-radius: 20px;
      padding: 40px 24px;
      text-align: center;
      margin-bottom: 24px;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
      animation: slideIn 0.3s ease;
    }

    @keyframes slideIn {
      from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(30px); }
      to { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }
    }

    .quiz-card .prompt-label {
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: #aaa;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 3px;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
    }

    .quiz-card .prompt-char {
      font-family: 'ZCOOL KuaiLe', cursive;
      font-size: 5rem;
      color: var(--ink);
      line-height: 1.1;
    }

    .quiz-card .prompt-zhuyin {
      font-size: 2.2rem;
      color: var(--accent);
      font-weight: 700;
    }

    .quiz-card .prompt-word {
      font-family: 'ZCOOL KuaiLe', cursive;
      font-size: 2.6rem;
      color: var(--ink);
      letter-spacing: 8px;
    }

    .quiz-card .hint-text {
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      color: #bbb;
      margin-top: 12px;
    }

    .options-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      gap: 12px;
    }

    .option-btn {
      padding: 18px;
      border-radius: 14px;
      border: 2px solid var(--mist);
      background: white;
      font-family: 'LXGW WenKai TC', sans-serif;
      font-size: 1.3rem;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.2s;
      font-weight: 700;
    }

    .option-btn:hover:not(.disabled) {
      border-color: var(--accent);
      background: #fff5f5;
      transform: scale(1.02);
    }

    .option-btn.correct-opt {
      border-color: var(--correct);
      background: #e8fdf0;
      color: var(--correct);
      animation: popCorrect 0.3s ease;
    }

    @keyframes popCorrect {
      0% { transform: scale(1); }
      50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
      100% { transform: scale(1); }
    }

    .option-btn.wrong-opt {
      border-color: var(--wrong);
      background: #fde8e8;
      color: var(--wrong);
      animation: shake 0.3s ease;
    }

    @keyframes shake {
      0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0); }
      25% { transform: translateX(-6px); }
      75% { transform: translateX(6px); }
    }

    .option-btn.disabled { cursor: default; opacity: 0.6; }

    .option-btn.reveal-correct {
      border-color: var(--correct);
      background: #e8fdf0;
    }

    /* ─── Result ─── */
    .result-card {
      background: white;
      border-radius: 20px;
      padding: 48px 24px;
      text-align: center;
    }

    .result-emoji { font-size: 4rem; margin-bottom: 16px; }

    .result-card h2 {
      font-family: 'ZCOOL KuaiLe', cursive;
      font-size: 1.8rem;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }

    .result-score {
      font-size: 3rem;
      font-weight: 900;
      color: var(--accent);
      margin: 16px 0;
    }

    .result-detail {
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      color: #777;
      margin-bottom: 24px;
    }

    .result-actions {
      display: flex;
      gap: 12px;
      justify-content: center;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .btn-primary {
      padding: 12px 28px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      border: none;
      background: var(--accent);
      color: white;
      font-family: 'LXGW WenKai TC', sans-serif;
      font-size: 1rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.2s;
    }

    .btn-primary:hover {
      background: var(--accent2);
      transform: translateY(-2px);
    }

    .btn-secondary {
      padding: 12px 28px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      border: 2px solid var(--ink);
      background: white;
      color: var(--ink);
      font-family: 'LXGW WenKai TC', sans-serif;
      font-size: 1rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.2s;
    }

    .btn-secondary:hover {
      background: var(--ink);
      color: white;
    }

    /* streak */
    .streak-badge {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 4px;
      padding: 4px 12px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff9a56, #ff6b6b);
      color: white;
      border-radius: 999px;
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      animation: streakPop 0.3s ease;
    }

    @keyframes streakPop {
      0% { transform: scale(0.8); }
      50% { transform: scale(1.15); }
      100% { transform: scale(1); }
    }

    .count-badge {
      background: var(--cloud);
      padding: 2px 10px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      color: #666;
      font-weight: 700;
    }

    /* ─── Responsive ─── */
    @media (max-width: 400px) {
      .app { padding: 12px; }
      .quiz-card .prompt-char { font-size: 4rem; }
      .quiz-card .prompt-word { font-size: 2rem; }
      .header h1 { font-size: 1.8rem; }
    }

import { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from "react";

// ─── Hanzi Data with Zhuyin & Pinyin ───────────────────────────────────
const HANZI_DATA = [
    // 言部
    { char: "記", words: ["記錄", "記憶", "日記"], zhuyin: "ㄐㄧˋ", pinyin: "jì", radical: "言" },
    { char: "論", words: ["討論", "論文", "言論"], zhuyin: "ㄌㄨㄣˋ", pinyin: "lùn", radical: "言" },
    { char: "詞", words: ["詞語", "歌詞", "詞彙"], zhuyin: "ㄘˊ", pinyin: "cí", radical: "言" },
    { char: "訪", words: ["訪問", "採訪", "拜訪"], zhuyin: "ㄈㄤˇ", pinyin: "fǎng", radical: "言" },
    { char: "評", words: ["評價", "評論", "批評"], zhuyin: "ㄆㄧㄥˊ", pinyin: "píng", radical: "言" },
    { char: "誠", words: ["誠實", "誠懇", "真誠"], zhuyin: "ㄔㄥˊ", pinyin: "chéng", radical: "言" },
    { char: "謝", words: ["感謝", "謝謝", "道謝"], zhuyin: "ㄒㄧㄝˋ", pinyin: "xiè", radical: "言" },
    { char: "識", words: ["認識", "知識", "常識"], zhuyin: "ㄕˋ", pinyin: "shì", radical: "言" },
    { char: "誤", words: ["錯誤", "誤會", "失誤"], zhuyin: "ㄨˋ", pinyin: "wù", radical: "言" },
    { char: "謙", words: ["謙虛", "謙讓", "謙遜"], zhuyin: "ㄑㄧㄢ", pinyin: "qiān", radical: "言" },

// ─── Utility ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function shuffle(arr) {
    const a = [...arr];
    for (let i = a.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
        const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
        [a[i], a[j]] = [a[j], a[i]];
    }
    return a;
}

function pickRandom(arr, n, exclude = []) {
    const filtered = arr.filter(x => !exclude.includes(x));
    return shuffle(filtered).slice(0, n);
}

// ─── Radicals list ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const ALL_RADICALS = [...new Set(HANZI_DATA.map(h => h.radical))];

// ─── App Component ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export default function HanziApp() {
    const [screen, setScreen] = useState("home"); // home | browse | quiz
    const [mode, setMode] = useState(null); // 1=看漢字選注音, 2=看注音選漢字, 3=造詞填空
    const [selectedRadicals, setSelectedRadicals] = useState(new Set(ALL_RADICALS));
    const [quizPool, setQuizPool] = useState([]);
    const [currentIdx, setCurrentIdx] = useState(0);
    const [options, setOptions] = useState([]);
    const [selected, setSelected] = useState(null);
    const [correct, setCorrect] = useState(null);
    const [score, setScore] = useState(0);
    const [total, setTotal] = useState(0);
    const [showResult, setShowResult] = useState(false);
    const [browseRadical, setBrowseRadical] = useState(ALL_RADICALS[0]);
    const [flipCard, setFlipCard] = useState(null);
    const [wordBlank, setWordBlank] = useState(null);
    const [streak, setStreak] = useState(0);
    const [bestStreak, setBestStreak] = useState(0);
    const [animKey, setAnimKey] = useState(0);

    const filteredData = HANZI_DATA.filter(h => selectedRadicals.has(h.radical));

    const startQuiz = (m) => {
        const pool = shuffle(filteredData).slice(0, Math.min(20, filteredData.length));
        setMode(m);
        setQuizPool(pool);
        setCurrentIdx(0);
        setScore(0);
        setTotal(0);
        setSelected(null);
        setCorrect(null);
        setShowResult(false);
        setStreak(0);
        setBestStreak(0);
        setScreen("quiz");
        generateQuestion(pool, 0, m);
    };

    const generateQuestion = useCallback((pool, idx, m) => {
        if (idx >= pool.length) {
            setShowResult(true);
            return;
        }
        const item = pool[idx];
        setAnimKey(k => k + 1);

        if (m === 1) {
            // 看漢字選注音
            const wrongs = pickRandom(HANZI_DATA.map(h => h.zhuyin), 2, [item.zhuyin]);
            setOptions(shuffle([item.zhuyin, ...wrongs]));
        } else if (m === 2) {
            // 看注音選漢字
            const wrongs = pickRandom(HANZI_DATA.map(h => h.char), 2, [item.char]);
            setOptions(shuffle([item.char, ...wrongs]));
        } else if (m === 3) {
            // 造詞填空
            const word = item.words[Math.floor(Math.random() * item.words.length)];
            const charIdx = word.indexOf(item.char);
            const blanked = word.substring(0, charIdx) + "＿" + word.substring(charIdx + 1);
            setWordBlank(blanked);
            const wrongs = pickRandom(
                HANZI_DATA.map(h => h.char),
                2,
                [item.char]
            );
            setOptions(shuffle([item.char, ...wrongs]));
        }
        setSelected(null);
        setCorrect(null);
    }, []);

    const handleSelect = (opt) => {
        if (selected !== null) return;
        const item = quizPool[currentIdx];
        let isCorrect;
        if (mode === 1) isCorrect = opt === item.zhuyin;
        else if (mode === 2) isCorrect = opt === item.char;
        else isCorrect = opt === item.char;

        setSelected(opt);
        setCorrect(isCorrect);
        if (isCorrect) {
            setScore(s => s + 1);
            setStreak(s => {
                const ns = s + 1;
                setBestStreak(b => Math.max(b, ns));
                return ns;
            });
        } else {
            setStreak(0);
        }
        setTotal(t => t + 1);

        setTimeout(() => {
            const next = currentIdx + 1;
            setCurrentIdx(next);
            generateQuestion(quizPool, next, mode);
        }, 1200);
    };

    const toggleRadical = (r) => {
        setSelectedRadicals(prev => {
            const next = new Set(prev);
            if (next.has(r)) next.delete(r);
            else next.add(r);
            return next;
        });
    };

    const selectAll = () => setSelectedRadicals(new Set(ALL_RADICALS));
    const clearAll = () => setSelectedRadicals(new Set());

    const browseCards = HANZI_DATA.filter(h => h.radical === browseRadical);

    // ─── Styles ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    const css = `
    @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=LXGW+WenKai+TC:wght@400;700&family=ZCOOL+KuaiLe&display=swap');

    :root {
      --ink: #1a1a2e;
      --paper: #faf7f0;
      --accent: #c0392b;
      --accent2: #e74c3c;
      --gold: #d4a017;
      --jade: #1a8a5c;
      --jade-light: #2ecc71;
      --cloud: #ecf0f1;
      --mist: #dfe6e9;
      --shadow: rgba(26, 26, 46, 0.08);
      --correct: #27ae60;
      --wrong: #e74c3c;
    }

    * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    body {
      font-family: 'LXGW WenKai TC', sans-serif;
      background: var(--paper);
      color: var(--ink);
      min-height: 100vh;
    }

    .app {
      max-width: 520px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      padding: 16px;
      min-height: 100vh;
    }

    /* ─── Header ─── */
    .header {
      text-align: center;
      padding: 32px 0 24px;
      position: relative;
    }

    .header h1 {
      font-family: 'ZCOOL KuaiLe', cursive;
      font-size: 2.4rem;
      color: var(--accent);
      letter-spacing: 4px;
      position: relative;
      display: inline-block;
    }

    .header h1::after {
      content: '';
      display: block;
      width: 60%;
      height: 3px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--gold), transparent);
      margin: 8px auto 0;
    }

    .subtitle {
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      color: #888;
      margin-top: 8px;
      letter-spacing: 2px;
    }

    /* ─── Navigation ─── */
    .nav-btn {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      padding: 10px 20px;
      border: 2px solid var(--ink);
      background: white;
      border-radius: 999px;
      font-family: 'LXGW WenKai TC', sans-serif;
      font-size: 0.95rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.2s;
      color: var(--ink);
    }

    .nav-btn:hover {
      background: var(--ink);
      color: white;
      transform: translateY(-2px);
      box-shadow: 0 4px 12px var(--shadow);
    }

    .nav-btn.active {
      background: var(--accent);
      border-color: var(--accent);
      color: white;
    }

    .back-btn {
      position: absolute;
      left: 0;
      top: 50%;
      transform: translateY(-50%);
      background: none;
      border: none;
      font-size: 1.5rem;
      cursor: pointer;
      color: var(--ink);
      padding: 8px;
      transition: transform 0.2s;
    }

    .back-btn:hover { transform: translateY(-50%) scale(1.2); }

    /* ─── Home ─── */
    .home-grid {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 16px;
      margin-top: 24px;
    }

    .mode-card {
      background: white;
      border-radius: 16px;
      padding: 24px;
      cursor: pointer;
      border: 2px solid transparent;
      transition: all 0.3s;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .mode-card::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
      height: 4px;
    }

    .mode-card:nth-child(1)::before { background: var(--accent); }
    .mode-card:nth-child(2)::before { background: var(--jade); }
    .mode-card:nth-child(3)::before { background: var(--gold); }
    .mode-card:nth-child(4)::before { background: var(--ink); }

    .mode-card:hover {
      transform: translateY(-4px);
      box-shadow: 0 12px 32px var(--shadow);
      border-color: var(--mist);
    }

    .mode-card .mode-icon {
      font-size: 2rem;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }

    .mode-card h3 {
      font-size: 1.15rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      margin-bottom: 6px;
    }

    .mode-card p {
      font-size: 0.82rem;
      color: #777;
      line-height: 1.5;
    }

    .mode-tag {
      display: inline-block;
      padding: 2px 10px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }

    .tag-red { background: #fce4e4; color: var(--accent); }
    .tag-green { background: #e4f9e8; color: var(--jade); }
    .tag-gold { background: #fff8e1; color: #b8860b; }
    .tag-dark { background: #eee; color: var(--ink); }

    /* ─── Radical Filter ─── */
    .radical-section {
      margin-top: 32px;
      padding: 20px;
      background: white;
      border-radius: 16px;
    }

    .radical-section h4 {
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      margin-bottom: 12px;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
    }

    .radical-chips {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 8px;
    }

    .radical-chip {
      padding: 6px 14px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      border: 1.5px solid var(--mist);
      background: var(--cloud);
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.2s;
      font-family: 'LXGW WenKai TC', sans-serif;
    }

    .radical-chip.on {
      background: var(--ink);
      color: white;
      border-color: var(--ink);
    }

    .radical-chip:hover { border-color: var(--accent); }

    .chip-actions {
      display: flex;
      gap: 8px;
    }

    .chip-actions button {
      background: none;
      border: none;
      color: var(--accent);
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      cursor: pointer;
      font-weight: 700;
      font-family: 'LXGW WenKai TC', sans-serif;
    }

    /* ─── Browse ─── */
    .browse-tabs {
      display: flex;
      overflow-x: auto;
      gap: 8px;
      padding: 8px 0;
      -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
      scrollbar-width: none;
    }

    .browse-tabs::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }

    .browse-tab {
      flex-shrink: 0;
      padding: 8px 16px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      border: 1.5px solid var(--mist);
      background: white;
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.2s;
      font-family: 'LXGW WenKai TC', sans-serif;
    }

    .browse-tab.active {
      background: var(--ink);
      color: white;
      border-color: var(--ink);
    }

    .card-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(140px, 1fr));
      gap: 12px;
      margin-top: 16px;
    }

    .char-card {
      background: white;
      border-radius: 12px;
      padding: 20px 12px;
      text-align: center;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.3s;
      border: 1.5px solid var(--cloud);
      position: relative;
    }

    .char-card:hover {
      transform: translateY(-3px);
      box-shadow: 0 8px 24px var(--shadow);
    }

    .char-card .big-char {
      font-family: 'ZCOOL KuaiLe', cursive;
      font-size: 2.8rem;
      color: var(--ink);
      line-height: 1.2;
    }

    .char-card .card-zhuyin {
      font-size: 1rem;
      color: var(--accent);
      margin-top: 4px;
      font-weight: 700;
    }

    .char-card .card-pinyin {
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      color: #999;
      margin-top: 2px;
    }

    .char-card .card-words {
      font-size: 0.72rem;
      color: #777;
      margin-top: 8px;
      line-height: 1.6;
    }

    .char-card.flipped {
      background: var(--ink);
    }

    .char-card.flipped .big-char { color: var(--gold); }
    .char-card.flipped .card-zhuyin { color: #ff7675; }
    .char-card.flipped .card-pinyin { color: #dfe6e9; }
    .char-card.flipped .card-words { color: #b2bec3; }

    /* ─── Quiz ─── */
    .quiz-header {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      margin-bottom: 24px;
      position: relative;
    }

    .quiz-progress {
      font-size: 0.82rem;
      color: #888;
    }

    .quiz-score {
      display: flex;
      gap: 16px;
      font-size: 0.85rem;
    }

    .score-item {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 4px;
      font-weight: 700;
    }

    .progress-bar {
      width: 100%;
      height: 4px;
      background: var(--cloud);
      border-radius: 2px;
      margin-bottom: 24px;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .progress-fill {
      height: 100%;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent), var(--gold));
      border-radius: 2px;
      transition: width 0.4s ease;
    }

    .quiz-card {
      background: white;
      border-radius: 20px;
      padding: 40px 24px;
      text-align: center;
      margin-bottom: 24px;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
      animation: slideIn 0.3s ease;
    }

    @keyframes slideIn {
      from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(30px); }
      to { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }
    }

    .quiz-card .prompt-label {
      font-size: 0.75rem;
      color: #aaa;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 3px;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
    }

    .quiz-card .prompt-char {
      font-family: 'ZCOOL KuaiLe', cursive;
      font-size: 5rem;
      color: var(--ink);
      line-height: 1.1;
    }

    .quiz-card .prompt-zhuyin {
      font-size: 2.2rem;
      color: var(--accent);
      font-weight: 700;
    }

    .quiz-card .prompt-word {
      font-family: 'ZCOOL KuaiLe', cursive;
      font-size: 2.6rem;
      color: var(--ink);
      letter-spacing: 8px;
    }

    .quiz-card .hint-text {
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      color: #bbb;
      margin-top: 12px;
    }

    .options-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      gap: 12px;
    }

    .option-btn {
      padding: 18px;
      border-radius: 14px;
      border: 2px solid var(--mist);
      background: white;
      font-family: 'LXGW WenKai TC', sans-serif;
      font-size: 1.3rem;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.2s;
      font-weight: 700;
    }

    .option-btn:hover:not(.disabled) {
      border-color: var(--accent);
      background: #fff5f5;
      transform: scale(1.02);
    }

    .option-btn.correct-opt {
      border-color: var(--correct);
      background: #e8fdf0;
      color: var(--correct);
      animation: popCorrect 0.3s ease;
    }

    @keyframes popCorrect {
      0% { transform: scale(1); }
      50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
      100% { transform: scale(1); }
    }

    .option-btn.wrong-opt {
      border-color: var(--wrong);
      background: #fde8e8;
      color: var(--wrong);
      animation: shake 0.3s ease;
    }

    @keyframes shake {
      0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0); }
      25% { transform: translateX(-6px); }
      75% { transform: translateX(6px); }
    }

    .option-btn.disabled { cursor: default; opacity: 0.6; }

    .option-btn.reveal-correct {
      border-color: var(--correct);
      background: #e8fdf0;
    }

    /* ─── Result ─── */
    .result-card {
      background: white;
      border-radius: 20px;
      padding: 48px 24px;
      text-align: center;
    }

    .result-emoji { font-size: 4rem; margin-bottom: 16px; }

    .result-card h2 {
      font-family: 'ZCOOL KuaiLe', cursive;
      font-size: 1.8rem;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }

    .result-score {
      font-size: 3rem;
      font-weight: 900;
      color: var(--accent);
      margin: 16px 0;
    }

    .result-detail {
      font-size: 0.9rem;
      color: #777;
      margin-bottom: 24px;
    }

    .result-actions {
      display: flex;
      gap: 12px;
      justify-content: center;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .btn-primary {
      padding: 12px 28px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      border: none;
      background: var(--accent);
      color: white;
      font-family: 'LXGW WenKai TC', sans-serif;
      font-size: 1rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.2s;
    }

    .btn-primary:hover {
      background: var(--accent2);
      transform: translateY(-2px);
    }

    .btn-secondary {
      padding: 12px 28px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      border: 2px solid var(--ink);
      background: white;
      color: var(--ink);
      font-family: 'LXGW WenKai TC', sans-serif;
      font-size: 1rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.2s;
    }

    .btn-secondary:hover {
      background: var(--ink);
      color: white;
    }

    /* streak */
    .streak-badge {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 4px;
      padding: 4px 12px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff9a56, #ff6b6b);
      color: white;
      border-radius: 999px;
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      animation: streakPop 0.3s ease;
    }

    @keyframes streakPop {
      0% { transform: scale(0.8); }
      50% { transform: scale(1.15); }
      100% { transform: scale(1); }
    }

    .count-badge {
      background: var(--cloud);
      padding: 2px 10px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      font-size: 0.78rem;
      color: #666;
      font-weight: 700;
    }

    /* ─── Responsive ─── */
    @media (max-width: 400px) {
      .app { padding: 12px; }
      .quiz-card .prompt-char { font-size: 4rem; }
      .quiz-card .prompt-word { font-size: 2rem; }
      .header h1 { font-size: 1.8rem; }
    }
  `;

    // ─── Render ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    return (
        <>
            <style>{css}</style>
            <div className="app">
                {/* ═══ HOME ═══ */}
                {screen === "home" && (
                    <>
                        <div className="header">
                            <h1>漢字高手</h1>
                            <div className="subtitle">108 課綱 · 高年級常用漢字</div>
                        </div>

                        <div className="home-grid">
                            <div className="mode-card" onClick={() => setScreen("browse")}>
                                <span className="mode-tag tag-dark">瀏覽</span>
                                <div className="mode-icon">📖</div>
                                <h3>字卡瀏覽</h3>
                                <p>按部首分類瀏覽所有漢字，含注音、拼音與造詞</p>
                            </div>

                            <div className="mode-card" onClick={() => startQuiz(1)}>
                                <span className="mode-tag tag-red">測驗一</span>
                                <div className="mode-icon">👀</div>
                                <h3>看漢字 → 選注音</h3>
                                <p>看到漢字，從三個注音中選出正確的讀音</p>
                            </div>

                            <div className="mode-card" onClick={() => startQuiz(2)}>
                                <span className="mode-tag tag-green">測驗二</span>
                                <div className="mode-icon">👂</div>
                                <h3>看注音 → 選漢字</h3>
                                <p>看到注音，從三個漢字中選出正確的字</p>
                            </div>

                            <div className="mode-card" onClick={() => startQuiz(3)}>
                                <span className="mode-tag tag-gold">測驗三</span>
                                <div className="mode-icon">✏️</div>
                                <h3>造詞填空</h3>
                                <p>詞語中缺一個字，從三個漢字中選出正確的填入</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        {/* Radical Filter */}
                        <div className="radical-section">
                            <h4>
                                部首篩選 <span className="count-badge">{selectedRadicals.size}/{ALL_RADICALS.length}</span>
                                <span className="chip-actions">
                                    <button onClick={selectAll}>全選</button>
                                    <button onClick={clearAll}>清除</button>
                                </span>
                            </h4>
                            <div className="radical-chips">
                                {ALL_RADICALS.map(r => (
                                    <span
                                        key={r}
                                        className={`radical-chip ${selectedRadicals.has(r) ? "on" : ""}`}
                                        onClick={() => toggleRadical(r)}
                                    >
                                        {r}部
                                    </span>
                                ))}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </>
                )}

                {/* ═══ BROWSE ═══ */}
                {screen === "browse" && (
                    <>
                        <div className="header" style={{ position: "relative" }}>
                            <button className="back-btn" onClick={() => setScreen("home")}>←</button>
                            <h1>字卡瀏覽</h1>
                        </div>

                        <div className="browse-tabs">
                            {ALL_RADICALS.map(r => (
                                <button
                                    key={r}
                                    className={`browse-tab ${browseRadical === r ? "active" : ""}`}
                                    onClick={() => { setBrowseRadical(r); setFlipCard(null); }}
                                >
                                    {r}部
                                </button>
                            ))}
                        </div>

                        <div className="card-grid">
                            {browseCards.map((h, i) => (
                                <div
                                    key={h.char}
                                    className={`char-card ${flipCard === i ? "flipped" : ""}`}
                                    onClick={() => setFlipCard(flipCard === i ? null : i)}
                                >
                                    <div className="big-char">{h.char}</div>
                                    <div className="card-zhuyin">{h.zhuyin}</div>
                                    <div className="card-pinyin">{h.pinyin}</div>
                                    <div className="card-words">{h.words.join("、")}</div>
                                </div>
                            ))}
                        </div>
                    </>
                )}

                {/* ═══ QUIZ ═══ */}
                {screen === "quiz" && !showResult && quizPool.length > 0 && currentIdx < quizPool.length && (
                    <>
                        <div className="header" style={{ position: "relative" }}>
                            <button className="back-btn" onClick={() => setScreen("home")}>←</button>
                            <h1>
                                {mode === 1 ? "看字選音" : mode === 2 ? "看音選字" : "造詞填空"}
                            </h1>
                        </div>

                        <div className="quiz-header">
                            <span className="quiz-progress">第 {currentIdx + 1} / {quizPool.length} 題</span>
                            <div className="quiz-score">
                                {streak >= 2 && (
                                    <span className="streak-badge" key={streak}>🔥 {streak} 連對</span>
                                )}
                                <span className="score-item">✓ {score}</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div className="progress-bar">
                            <div className="progress-fill" style={{ width: `${((currentIdx) / quizPool.length) * 100}%` }} />
                        </div>

                        <div className="quiz-card" key={animKey}>
                            {mode === 1 && (
                                <>
                                    <div className="prompt-label">這個字怎麼念？</div>
                                    <div className="prompt-char">{quizPool[currentIdx].char}</div>
                                    <div className="hint-text">{quizPool[currentIdx].pinyin}</div>
                                </>
                            )}
                            {mode === 2 && (
                                <>
                                    <div className="prompt-label">這個注音是哪個字？</div>
                                    <div className="prompt-zhuyin">{quizPool[currentIdx].zhuyin}</div>
                                    <div className="hint-text">{quizPool[currentIdx].pinyin}</div>
                                </>
                            )}
                            {mode === 3 && (
                                <>
                                    <div className="prompt-label">請選出正確的字填入空格</div>
                                    <div className="prompt-word">{wordBlank}</div>
                                    <div className="hint-text">{quizPool[currentIdx].zhuyin} · {quizPool[currentIdx].pinyin}</div>
                                </>
                            )}
                        </div>

                        <div className="options-grid">
                            {options.map((opt, i) => {
                                const item = quizPool[currentIdx];
                                const correctAnswer = mode === 1 ? item.zhuyin : item.char;
                                let cls = "option-btn";
                                if (selected !== null) {
                                    cls += " disabled";
                                    if (opt === selected && correct) cls += " correct-opt";
                                    else if (opt === selected && !correct) cls += " wrong-opt";
                                    else if (opt === correctAnswer && !correct) cls += " reveal-correct";
                                }
                                return (
                                    <button key={i} className={cls} onClick={() => handleSelect(opt)}>
                                        {opt}
                                    </button>
                                );
                            })}
                        </div>
                    </>
                )}

                {/* ═══ RESULT ═══ */}
                {screen === "quiz" && showResult && (
                    <>
                        <div className="header" style={{ position: "relative" }}>
                            <button className="back-btn" onClick={() => setScreen("home")}>←</button>
                            <h1>測驗結果</h1>
                        </div>

                        <div className="result-card">
                            <div className="result-emoji">
                                {score / quizPool.length >= 0.9 ? "🏆" : score / quizPool.length >= 0.7 ? "🌟" : score / quizPool.length >= 0.5 ? "💪" : "📚"}
                            </div>
                            <h2>
                                {score / quizPool.length >= 0.9 ? "太厲害了！" : score / quizPool.length >= 0.7 ? "表現很好！" : score / quizPool.length >= 0.5 ? "繼續加油！" : "多練習幾次吧！"}
                            </h2>
                            <div className="result-score">{score} / {quizPool.length}</div>
                            <div className="result-detail">
                                正確率 {Math.round((score / quizPool.length) * 100)}%
                                {bestStreak >= 2 && ` · 最高連對 ${bestStreak} 題`}
                            </div>
                            <div className="result-actions">
                                <button className="btn-primary" onClick={() => startQuiz(mode)}>再來一次</button>
                                <button className="btn-secondary" onClick={() => setScreen("home")}>回首頁</button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </>
                )}
            </div>
        </>
    );
}
